She smiles broadly again from 18-22s, maintaining eye contact, before opening her mouth to speak. From 22-26s, she continues speaking facing forward and raises her right hand near her chest in a gesture. No text graphics appear on screen, and the background remains unchanged throughout the clip.

Her hands disappear briefly before she raises her right hand near her upper chest with fingers spread. She lowers her hand again while continuing to articulate. Her mouth moves from open to closed throughout. No text overlays are visible.
